prompt: A dramatic close-up selfie-style stage photo of a Japanese idol performer leaning toward the camera from a low angle, filling most of the frame with her upper body and outstretched arm. She has long straight-to-wavy {argument name="hair color" default="dark auburn brown"} hair with glossy highlights and heavy side-swept bangs partly covering one eye. Her expression is cute and intimate, with one hand near her mouth in a shy idol pose, as if interacting directly with fans during a live concert. She wears a dark gothic idol costume in black and deep {argument name="accent color" default="purple"}, featuring 5 clearly visible outfit elements: a shiny corset-style cropped top with metallic trim, a black belt at the waist with silver grommets, sheer black mesh opera-length gloves, multiple strapped arm bands on the upper arm, and draped silver chains across the bodice and skirt. Add glossy patent-leather textures, studs, buckles, lace, and layered frilled fabric for a high-detail J-pop or anisong concert look. The background is a large indoor live stage with bright blue-white spotlights, haze, truss rigging, and an LED screen glowing with soft abstract shapes, creating strong backlight and bokeh. Use cinematic concert photography, high contrast, cool-toned lighting with purple-blue highlights, shallow depth of field, slight lens distortion from the close arm’s-length perspective, dynamic foreshortening, and a vertical smartphone composition. Make the image feel energetic, glamorous, and fan-service oriented, like {argument name="idol group concept" default="a dark fantasy idol live performance"}.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具戏剧性的自拍视角舞台特写照片，一位日本偶像表演者从低角度向镜头倾身，上半身和伸出的手臂占据了画面的大部分。她留着长长的直发至微卷发，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="深红褐色"}，带有光泽感，厚重的斜刘海遮住了一只眼睛。她的表情可爱且亲密，一只手放在嘴边，摆出害羞的偶像姿势，仿佛正在演唱会现场与粉丝直接互动。她穿着一套黑色与深 {argument name="accent color" default="紫色"} 的哥特风偶像演出服，包含 5 个清晰可见的服装元素：带有金属饰边的亮面紧身胸衣式短上衣、腰间带有银色金属扣眼的黑色腰带、黑色透明网纱歌剧手套、上臂的多条绑带，以及横跨胸前和裙摆的垂坠银链。添加亮面漆皮质感、铆钉、搭扣、蕾丝和层叠的荷叶边面料，打造高细节的 J-pop 或动画歌曲演唱会造型。背景是大型室内现场舞台，配有明亮的蓝白色聚光灯、烟雾、桁架装置以及闪烁着柔和抽象形状的 LED 屏幕，营造出强烈的逆光和虚化效果。采用电影级演唱会摄影风格，高对比度，冷色调灯光配以紫蓝色高光，浅景深，近距离手臂视角带来的轻微镜头畸变，动态的前缩透视，以及竖屏手机构图。让画面充满活力、魅力十足且具有粉丝向服务感，如同 {argument name="idol group concept" default="一场暗黑奇幻风格的偶像现场演出"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 哥特风偶像演唱会自拍：一张哥特风格偶像向镜头倾身的竖构图演唱会特写肖像，非常适合生成具有戏剧性的现场表演视觉效果或以粉丝为中心的宣传艺术图。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
